html:
Exclusive to:

The Weevole Carapace is an Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is dropped by Weevoles upon death.

Weevole Carapace can be used to make the Weevole Mantle. Although it cannot be eaten, it can be placed in the Crock Pot in order to make Hard Shell Tacos.

×2

×2

The Weevole Carapace is an Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is dropped by Weevoles upon death.
Weevole Carapace can be used to make the Weevole Mantle. Although it cannot be eaten, it can be placed in the Crock Pot in order to make Hard Shell Tacos.

The '''Weevole Carapace''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is dropped by [[Weevole]]s upon death.

Weevole Carapace can be used to make the [[Weevole Mantle]]. Although it cannot be eaten, it can be placed in the [[Crock Pot]] in order to make [[Hard Shell Tacos]].

=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Weevole Carapace
|count1 = 4
|item2 = Chitin
|count2 = 2
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Weevole Mantle}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Weevole Carapace
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Vegetables
|item3 = Filler
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Hard Shell Tacos}}
{{Mob Dropped Items}}
